prose: The frontier-orbitals calculation on ethylene using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase was completed with the following results: HOMO energy: -7.61558 eV, LUMO energy: -0.17987 eV, HOMO-LUMO gap: 7.43572 eV. The method used was B3LYP/def2-TZVP at the PySCF backend. Warnings from the calculation included: the total/electronic energy is finite, SCF converged within 6 cycles, header and headline fields are present and valid. The calculation is deemed trustworthy.
